# truenas_iscsi_global (Data Source)

Reads the TrueNAS global iSCSI configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_global" "config" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `alua` (Boolean) Whether ALUA is enabled.
- `basename` (String) The base name for iSCSI targets.
- `id` (Number) The identifier (always 1).
- `isns_servers` (List of String) List of iSNS server addresses.
- `listen_port` (Number) The TCP port iSCSI listens on.
- `pool_avail_threshold` (Number) Pool available space threshold percentage.
